doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_div_2si: divide x by 2^e at the requested precision, rounded per rnd, returning {value, ternary}. Structurally identical to mpfr_mul_2si with the exponent shift sign flipped (postExp - e instead of postExp + e). The mantissa is unchanged; only the exponent shifts (plus any refit-to-prec rounding). Class is 'arithmetic' (50ms budget). Singular values propagate.
c_signature: int mpfr_div_2si(mpfr_t rop, mpfr_srcptr op, long e, mpfr_rnd_t rnd)
divergence_from_c: Same as mul_2si: `e` is bigint (no int64 cap), no emax/emin range check (schema places no bound on exp), prec is positional, return is {value, ternary}.
refs: mpfr/src/div_2si.c L24–L59 — the C reference; identical shape to mul_2si with exp - n instead of exp + n.
src/ops/mul_2si.ts — sibling; identical body except the final exponent sign.
CLAUDE.md 'Hallucination-risk callouts' — ternary direction; rounding-mode count is FIVE; signed zero observable.
